Oracc: CAMS/GKAB — CAMS Geography of Knowledge Corpus

SpTU 5, 284 [loan][via cams/gkab]

Obverse
o 1o 1

1 MA.NA 2/3 MA.NA 2 1/2 GIN₂ KU₃.BABBAR ša₂ mšul-[lum?]

(o 1) The 1 2/3 mina 2 1/2 shekels of silver of Šullum, son of Pirʾu, descendant of Asu, incumbent on Nabu-ban-apli, son of Nadna, will grow by 1 mina 1 shekel of silver incumbent on [him] from the 1st of Ululu.

o 22

A-šu₂ ša₂ mpir-ʾu A lu₂a-su-u₂ ina UGU mdNA₃—DU₃—[TUR]

o 33

A-šu₂ ša₂ mSUMna ul-tu U₄ 1-KAM₂ ša₂ itiKIN

o 44

ina muḫ-ḫi 1 ma-ne₂-e 1 GIN₂ KU₃.BABBAR ina muḫ-⸢ḫi⸣-[šu₂]

o 55

i-rab-bi E₂-su u fṣu-le-e—⸢taš⸣-[me-e]

(o 5) His house and Ṣule-tašme, his girl, and [whatever there is] that he owns in the city or open country (are) pledged to Šullum until Šullum receives full repayment of his silver.

o 66

ṣa!-ḫir-ti-šu₂ u mim-mu-šu₂ ša₂ IRI u ⸢EDIN⸣ [ma-la ba-šu-u₂]

o 77

maš-ka-nu ša₂ mšul-lum a-di m!šul-lu-⸢mu⸣

o 88

KU₃.BABBAR-šu₂ i-šal-li-mu ki-i pi-i

(o 8) Like what is in the contract-tablet of exchange ... [...]

o 99

u₂-il₃-ti maḫ-ri!-ti x x [...]

Reverse
r 1r 1

MU 10-KAM₂ ina <muḫ?>-ḫi? maš-ka-nu x [...]

(r 1) year 10, concerning the pledge ... [...]

r 22

u₂-il₃-le-e-ti ša₂ mšul-⸢lum⸣ [...]

(r 2) the contract-tablets of Šullum [...]

r 33

mdNA₃—DU₃—TUR ša₂ 1 MA.NA 9 GIN₂ u 1/3 6 ⸢GIN₂⸣

(r 3) Nabu-ban-apli, of 1 mina 9 shekel ... [...]

r 44

lu₂mu-kin-nu mdEN—ŠEŠ-MEŠ—SU A-šu₂ ša₂ mx-[...]

(r 4) Witnesses: Bel-ahhe-eriba, son of [PN]; Bel-ibni, son of Kudurru; Bel-zer-ibni, son [of] Bel-uballiṭ; Šumaya, son of [PN]

r 55

mdEN—DU₃ A-šu₂ ša₂ mNIG₂.DU mdEN—⸢NUMUN⸣-DU₃ A-[šu₂ ša₂]

r 66

mdEN—DINiṭ mšu-ma-a A-šu₂ ša₂ m[...]

r 77

u₃ lu₂UMBISAG mAa A-šu₂ ša₂ mx-[...]

(r 7) and the scribe Aplaya, son of [PN], descendant of Ekur-zakir. Babylon, [month ...], 1st day, 15th year of [RN], king of Babylon [...].

r 88

A mE₂.KUR—za-kir ⸢TIN.TIR⸣[ki itix]

r 99

U₄ ⸢1?⸣-KAM₂ MU 15-KAM₂ [m...]

Top
t.e. 1t.e. 1

LUGAL TIN.TIRki [...]

t.e. 22

ša₂ ina ŠU 50 GIN₂ KU₃.BABBAR ša₂ in-x-[...]

(t.e. 2) which [gave], in the hand, 50 shekel of silver which ... [... son] of Bel-zer-iddin ... [...]

t.e. 33

[... A]-šu₂ ša₂ mdEN—NUMUN—DU₃ x [...]
